# StudentPerks — Full Catalog
> Complete directory of free tools, credits, and pro plans for students, startups, and open source projects.
> Source: https://www.studentperks.dev
> Last updated: 2026-03-18

StudentPerks is a curated, verified directory of 150+ deals worth $500K+ in free software, cloud credits, and professional tools. Every deal includes step-by-step claim instructions. Audiences: students (verify with .edu email), startups (apply with company details), and open source maintainers (apply with public repo).

---

## All Deals (sorted by category)

### Dev Tools
- [GitHub Student Developer Pack](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/github-education) — Free access to 100+ developer tools. Value: $200+/year. For: Students.
- [JetBrains](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/jetbrains-students) — Free access to all JetBrains IDEs. Value: $649/year. For: Students, Open Source.
- [MongoDB Atlas](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/mongodb-students) — Free M0 cluster forever + student credits. Value: Free tier. For: Students, Open Source.
- [Docker](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/docker-students) — Free Docker Pro for students & OSS. Value: $60/year. For: Students, Open Source.
- [Supabase](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/supabase-startups) — Credits and free tier for builders. Value: $2,500 credits. For: Startups, Open Source.
- [Sentry](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/sentry-oss) — Free error tracking for OSS & startups. Value: $312/year. For: Open Source, Startups.
- [Apple Developer Program](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/apple-developer-student) — Free membership via Apple Developer Academy. Value: $99/year. For: Students.

### AI
- [GitHub Copilot](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/copilot-students) — Free AI pair programming for students. Value: $100/year. For: Students, Open Source.
- [OpenAI Startup Program](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/openai-api-startups) — API credits and support for AI startups. Value: $2,500+ credits. For: Startups.

### SaaS
- [Notion](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/notion-education) — Free Plus plan for students & educators. Value: $96/year. For: Students.
- [Linear](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/linear-startups) — Free Standard plan for startups. Value: $200/year. For: Startups.
- [Stripe Atlas](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/stripe-atlas) — Startup incorporation with $5K in credits. Value: $5,000+ credits. For: Startups.
- [Slack](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/slack-startups) — Pro plan credits for startups. Value: $500/year. For: Startups.

### Cloud
- [AWS Activate](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/aws-activate) — Up to $100K in AWS credits for startups. Value: $100,000. For: Startups.
- [Vercel](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/vercel-pro) — Free Pro plan for open source & startups. Value: $240/year. For: Startups, Open Source.
- [DigitalOcean](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/digitalocean-students) — Free cloud credits via GitHub Education. Value: $200+ credits. For: Students, Startups.
- [Cloudflare](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/cloudflare-startups) — Free Pro plan and startup program. Value: $240/year. For: Startups, Open Source.
- [Railway](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/railway-oss) — Free hosting for open source projects. Value: $60/year. For: Open Source, Students.
- [Microsoft Azure](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/azure-students) — Free $100 credit + services for students. Value: $100-$150,000. For: Students, Startups.

### Design
- [Figma](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/figma-education) — Free Professional plan for students. Value: $144/year. For: Students.
- [Adobe Creative Cloud](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/adobe-creative-cloud) — 60%+ discount on all Creative Cloud apps. Value: $360/year savings. For: Students.

### Learning
- [Coursera for Campus](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/coursera-students) — Free access to 3,800+ courses. Value: $400+/year. For: Students.

### Entertainment
- [Spotify Premium Student](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/spotify-student) — Premium at half price for students. Value: $72/year savings. For: Students.
- [YouTube Premium](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/youtube-premium-student) — Premium at student discount — ad-free videos & music. Value: $72/year savings. For: Students.
- [Amazon Prime Student](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/amazon-prime-student) — 6-month free trial + 50% off Prime. Value: $75/year savings. For: Students.
- [Apple Education Pricing](https://www.studentperks.dev/deals/apple-education-store) — Save on Mac, iPad & more with student pricing. Value: Up to $400 off. For: Students.

## Interactive Tools

- [Student Freebies Finder](https://www.studentperks.dev/student-freebies-finder) — 3-step wizard: select country, university, and major to get personalized deal recommendations with scoring.
- [100+ Free Tools for Students](https://www.studentperks.dev/free-tools-for-students) — Comprehensive list of free tools grouped by use case.
- [Savings Calculator](https://www.studentperks.dev/savings-calculator) — Calculate how much you can save with student deals.
- [This Week](https://www.studentperks.dev/this-week) — New and updated deals from the past week.
- [AI Deal Finder](https://www.studentperks.dev/discover) — Search deals by keyword with intelligent matching.
- [Stack Builder](https://www.studentperks.dev/stack) — Select your tech stack and get relevant free deals.

---

## Browse by Category

- [Dev Tools](https://www.studentperks.dev/category/dev)
- [AI](https://www.studentperks.dev/category/ai)
- [SaaS](https://www.studentperks.dev/category/saas)
- [Learning](https://www.studentperks.dev/category/learning)
- [Cloud](https://www.studentperks.dev/category/cloud)
- [Design](https://www.studentperks.dev/category/design)
- [Entertainment](https://www.studentperks.dev/category/entertainment)

## Browse by Audience

- [For Students](https://www.studentperks.dev/for/students)
- [For Startups](https://www.studentperks.dev/for/startups)
- [For Open Source](https://www.studentperks.dev/for/opensource)

---

## API & Feeds

- All deals as JSON: https://www.studentperks.dev/api/deals
- Sitemap: https://www.studentperks.dev/sitemap.xml
- RSS Feed: https://www.studentperks.dev/blog/feed.xml
- LLMs summary: https://www.studentperks.dev/llms.txt
- LLMs full catalog (this file): https://www.studentperks.dev/llms-full.txt

---

## About

StudentPerks is maintained at https://www.studentperks.dev. For questions or to submit a deal, visit https://www.studentperks.dev/submit.
